_README: Your level's identity card. Fill in every field. Delete the _README/_doc_* notes when you're done.
name: Your Level Name
_doc_name: Shown in the level picker on the home screen.
author: Your Name
theme: free text — e.g. underwater, city, volcano
_doc_theme: Free-text flavour describing your level's world.
_doc_faceAsset: Path to YOUR pixel-face SVG. Drop the file into THIS level's assets/ folder and point here. It becomes your character's head. Update the path to match your level folder name.
_doc_accentColor: A hex colour that is your level's own identity (used for UI accents). Make it yours.
